axisAnnotation: generation-acceptance metrics (our outputs judged by real Hancom), NOT parsing recall; do not juxtapose with parser-project numbers
denominatorRule: judged-only; unverified is a separate bucket, never a pass; oracle columns are filled only for releases with a real box run

entries.oracle: real Hancom COM 12.0.0.3288 (Windows box, unattended) + Mac Hancom GUI sample

parsed.note: redline docs judged via InitScan/GetText (42/42); textless docs count as non-parsed by definition

render.note: Hancom refuses PDF export of tracked-change documents (measured limitation)

formFillDifferential.note: wild public form bases, intent-stratified: short 15/22, medium 12/22, overflow-stress 7/22; honest robustness finding

authoringGates.note: the 7 fails are intentional 결문-absent negative variants; real authored docs 58/58
